title: Logs, Events, Metrics, Inspect, Debugging, and Incident Evidence · Spiral Delivery Review
summary: An operations reviewer reconstructs logs, events, metrics, inspect, debugging, and incident evidence from delayed evidence, challenges one retained misconception, and extends the layered Docker incident evidence packet under a changed constraint. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for layered Docker incident evidence packet after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Design stdout and stderr logging plus driver, delivery, rotation, retention, metadata, backpressure, and secret-redaction policy.
Correlate time-bounded events with inspect state, exit cause, OOM, restart count, health output, mounts, networks, and effective configuration.
Interpret CPU, memory, network, block I/O, PIDs, cgroups, writable-layer size, image store, volume, and host pressure evidence.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Docker Logs Drivers Rotation · changed case · Review Docker Logs Drivers Rotation
steps.instruction:
review case — A review container exits only after revision 4; an operator restarts it and edits files with exec before collecting state. Reconstruct the first causal layer from inspect, events, logs, stats, and release identity.

Which action demonstrates Docker Logs Drivers Rotation without dropping earlier contracts?

Evidence target: Docker Logs Drivers Rotation · changed case · Review Docker Logs Drivers Rotation.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for design stdout and stderr logging plus driver, delivery, rotation, retention, metadata, backpressure, and secret-redaction policy. For Docker Logs Drivers Rotation · changed case · Review Docker Logs Drivers Rotation, keep Docker Logs Drivers Rotation connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
